Learn Science Better with Scaffolded Practice

Students start with guided fill-in-the-blanks, then switch to fully open-ended answers as confidence grows. Master the language of science through iterative mastery.

🛡️ Your Hero

Equip swords, staffs and armour — everything you wear shows on your avatar. Earn gold and XP by solving science questions.
—
Equipment

🏰 Endless Dungeon

Your hero fights automatically — weapon skills and pet abilities fire on cooldown. Beat each floor boss to descend deeper, where monsters grow ever stronger and richer. Each raid advances up to 3 floors, then you make camp — your progress is saved and the next raid carries on from there. 3 raids a day.
— runs left today Wave 1 / 5
🕸️ 🕸️ 🕯️ 🕯️ 🕯️

🏆 Leaderboard

Do the most questions to top the monthly board and win Popular vouchers.
🎁 Monthly prize: the top 5 students with the most questions done each month win a $10 Popular voucher each. Questions only count once, and need a genuine answer. 🕹️ Arcade prizes: the top 3 each month in Science Defenders and Science Raiders also win a $10 Popular voucher each. 🎟️ Streak prize: practise 10+ questions every day for 30 days in a row and win a $10 Popular voucher — track your progress on the Your Hero page. 🏆 Grand prizes: the top 3 all-time XP earners win $200, $100 and $50 Popular vouchers.

Science Spire

Game Objects

Replace any Science Raiders sprite — click a tile's box and paste a PNG (Ctrl/⌘+V), drop a file, or use Upload. Big images are scaled down automatically and saved to Firebase, then the game updates live.
Loading…

Flag This Question

Let the teacher know if something is wrong with this question (e.g. wrong answer, typo, unclear wording).

AI Marking Guide

Tell the AI how you mark. These instructions are applied to every "AI Mark" grading across Practice, Student View and Worksheets.

LenientBalancedStrict

AI Question Generation Guide

Save instructions for how the AI should build a question when you use "Build from screenshot / PDF". Applied to every generation.

Build from screenshot / PDF

Paste a screenshot (Ctrl/⌘+V), drop an image or PDF, or choose a file — AI fills in ONE question. To import a whole paper at once, use Bulk import below.

📋 Click here, then paste your screenshot (Ctrl/⌘+V)
— or drop an image / PDF here
📚 Bulk import a whole paper
Upload a PDF (or image) with many questions — AI splits them into separate questions and adds them all to your Vetting list, where you format each and add pictures, then approve into the bank.

⚡ Rapid add to vetting

Paste a screenshot (Ctrl/⌘+V). AI reads it, enhances the whole picture to black & white, and drops the question straight into your Vetting list — no editor stop. Keep pasting to add more; they all process in the background. Tip: open this from anywhere with Ctrl/⌘+Shift+V.

📋 Paste your screenshot here (Ctrl/⌘+V)
— then paste the next one, and the next…
Click the box above, then paste.
Added 0 · Processing 0

Schedule New Question

Select a question from the bank and choose when it should be released. Questions are released at 12:00 AM Singapore time (SGT) on the chosen date.

Edit Scheduled Release

Change the release date for this scheduled question.

Worksheet preview ⬆ pulls a question onto the previous page (fit 2+ per page) · ⤓ pushes it onto a new page · updates live.

🎓 Student Preview

This is exactly how students will see this question in practice mode — each part has its own 💡 Hint and 🤖 AI Mark buttons, so try answering yourself.

Manage topics

Add a custom topic under a level, or remove topics you don't use. Questions already saved keep their topic.

🎉 You won a $10 voucher!

You're a monthly top-5 winner — enter your details to claim your $10 Popular voucher.

Attend class in person? You can collect your voucher in class instead — no address needed, just confirm below.

Are you sure?

This action cannot be undone.

Regenerate question

This makes a new copy of the question. The picture stays exactly the same and the original is never changed. Tell the AI how you want the new copy to differ.

Student

Every question this student attempted, in order, with the exact time (Singapore time). Attempts answered less than 15 seconds after the previous one are highlighted in red — rapid-fire answers can be a sign of copying.

# Date & Time (SGT) Question Score Mode Gap

Save Worksheet

Name your worksheet and choose the answer format.

🎁 Booster Pack

Victory!

✨ AI Auto-Vet in progress

Starting…

AI is classifying each question's topic & category, writing the model answers, and adding any missing wording before moving it into the bank.

✂️ Crop & reposition

Drag the box to move it; drag a handle to resize. Then tap Apply crop.

✏️ Touch up & label

Erase / Paint: drag over the image. Line: drag from start to end. Text: click where the label goes, type, then Enter.

📚 Bulk import

Reading your paper…

AI is splitting the document into separate questions. A long paper can take up to a minute — you'll land in the Vetting list when it's done.
